hero.kicker: Content & AI Writing - Ansiversa mini app
hero.title: Creative Title Generator
hero.description: Turn a topic, audience, and style direction into organized title ideas for articles, videos, products, email, and social posts.

flow.title: Brief †’ Generate †’ Review
steps: Create a project with topic, audience, and language
Choose generation type, style, and optional keywords
Review generated title options with placeholder scores
Return through history when a previous generation needs context

differences.title: A small title lab for repeatable writing work
differences.description: Creative Title Generator keeps title ideation tied to a saved brief instead of scattering one-off ideas across notes.

items.title: Reusable briefs
items.description: Save topic, audience, language, and project status for future generation passes.

items.title: Generation modes
items.description: Use lightweight V1 modes for blog, video, product, social, and email titles.

items.title: Review trail
items.description: Generated titles and jobs stay connected to the project for quick review.

feel.title: Focused, fast, and easy to revisit
feel.description: The V1 experience keeps the interface simple: define the brief, generate a few ideas, compare scores, and move on.

items.title: Clear setup
items.description: Projects capture the writing context before generation starts.

items.title: Compact results
items.description: Generated titles are short, scan-friendly records with category and score.

items.title: No heavyweight tooling
items.description: The first version avoids AI integrations, editors, and export packages.

audiences.title: Who uses Creative Title Generator
audiences.description: Useful for creators and teams that need repeatable title ideation without opening a full writing suite.

items.title: Content creators
items.description: Generate title directions for articles, videos, newsletters, and social posts.

items.title: Marketing teams
items.description: Save campaign topics and compare title angles for specific audiences.

items.title: Solo builders
items.description: Quickly create product, feature, and update title options from one brief.

resourceSection.title: Creative Title Generator essentials
resourceSection.description: The V1 foundation focuses on the core project-to-generation loop.

items.title: Projects
items.description: Create, edit, and delete title briefs.

items.title: Generator
items.description: Choose type, style, and keywords before generating title options.

items.title: Results and history
items.description: Review generated titles and previous jobs.

groupedSection.title: A workflow built around title briefs
groupedSection.description: The app keeps ideation steps separated while preserving the context for each generation.

items.name: Topic
items.description: Capture the subject or campaign idea.

items.name: Audience
items.description: Describe who the title should speak to.

items.name: History
items.description: Keep generation runs easy to revisit.

technicalSection.title: Built on the standard mini-app contract
technicalSection.description: Creative Title Generator follows the Ansiversa V1 mini-app architecture.
items: Protected project, generation, result, and history APIs.
Isolated database with TitleProjects, GeneratedTitles, and TitleJobs.
Shared React layout, authenticated page state, generated API types, and route-aware navigation.

finalCta.title: Open Creative Title Generator
finalCta.description: Create a title brief and generate your first V1 title options.
